issue_title: bug: can't prevent default behavior about close tab
issue_body_preview:
### Describe the bug
refer to: https://github.com/DTStack/Taier/issues/459

I need a confirm before close, but no matter `editor.onClose` or something else, it all can't prevent close.

<!-- Please describe the bug in a clear and concise way -->

### Versions

<!-- Please provide the versio
test_description_zh: 在编辑器中打开多个标签页，注册 onCloseTab 事件监听并在回调中阻止默认关闭行为（例如弹出确认对话框，用户点击取消时不关闭标签页）。然后点击某个标签页的关闭按钮，观察标签页是否仍然保留。
expected_result_zh: 当在 onCloseTab 回调中阻止了默认关闭行为后，点击标签页关闭按钮时标签页不应被关闭，标签页应保持打开状态，直到用户确认关闭后才真正移除标签页。
